assumption_note: A #10 can of a concentrated paste (tomato paste) runs on the denser/heavier end of the standard #10 can range -- used 6.9 lb. Checked before the general #10 can catch-all below.

Standard institutional #10 can net weight -- commonly cited in foodservice references as roughly 6 lb 6 oz to 7 lb depending on contents (sauces, beans, tomatoes, canned fruit); used 6.5 lb as a single representative estimate across all #10-can Sysco items rather than a per-product breakdown (the real variance across contents is modest relative to the overall uncertainty here). Verified with a $/lb check across the full #10-can list: e.g. "SAUCE MARINARA CA" implies $7.53/lb, "BEAN BLACK" implies $6.32/lb, "TOMATO PASTE FANCY CA" implies $7.00/lb -- all plausible institutional canned-food prices.
